category_sources: source_facts.description says epic5 is an enhanced, programmable IRC client; official EPIC resources and manpage describe EPIC5 as an IRC client.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is epic5; official EPIC distribution path and documentation use EPIC5.
docs_sources: Official EPIC manpage lists http://help.epicsol.org/ as the Online EPIC Help Pages and epicsol.org as the EPIC home page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official EPIC sources are distributed as release tarballs from ftp.epicsol.org, and no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an enhanced programmable IRC client; official EPIC help/manpage references built-in help and scripting-oriented IRC use.
